text:

making all in ./apps/ascd...
cc -02	-I/usr/X11R6/include -I/include  -DCSRG_BASED  -DFUNCPROTO=15 -DNARROWPROTO   -c ascd.c
cc -02	-I/usr/X11R6/include -I/include  -DCSRG_BASED  -DFUNCPROTO=15 -DNARROWPROTO   -c cdrom.c
cc -02	-I/usr/X11R6/include -I/include  -DCSRG_BASED  -DFUNCPROTO=15 -DNARROWPROTO   -c cdinfo.c
cc -02	-I/usr/X11R6/include -I/include  -DCSRG_BASED  -DFUNCPROTO=15 -DNARROWPROTO   -c plat_freebsd.c
plat_freebsd.c:40: scsi.h: No such file or directory
*** Error core 1

Stop.

Fix: 

assume problem with new CAM-based scsi headers.
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build afterstep-devel on 3.0-RELEASE or 3.0-CURRENT
